get.description: Return the single profile row. 404 if onboarding hasn't run yet.

post.description: Upsert the single profile row with whichever fields the user provided.

get.description:
Return scored jobs sorted by score descending.

``exclude_status=skipped`` (the default) hides skipped jobs from the
main feed. Pass ``exclude_status=`` (empty) to see everything; pass
a specific status to see only that bucket via the filter dropdown.

Response List Applications Api Applications Get
Response List Practice Attempts Api Applications  Application Id  Interview Attempts Get

role_context.title: Role Context
role_context.description: Two-paragraph synthesized role summary from ``LLMProvider.summarize_role``, cached on the latest interview_questions material. Falls back to the raw job description if synthesis fails.

ProfileUpdate.title: ProfileUpdate
ProfileUpdate.description: Body for ``POST /api/profile``. All fields optional; missing → unchanged.

ProviderMetadata.title: ProviderMetadata
ProviderMetadata.description:
One provider option as the onboarding UI renders it.

``label`` is the user-visible name. ``is_experimental`` drives the
yellow "Experimental" badge — only ``claude_code`` carries it (per
ADR-0005 R-01 the CLI is a documented gray zone). ``requires_api_key``
tells the wizard whether to render the API-key input. ``default_model``
is what we save to ``app_config`` if the user doesn't override.

provider.title: Provider
provider.description: One of: mock, anthropic_api, claude_code, ollama
